verdict: condensate-free functional convex (diagonal infimum global); off-diagonal condensate Hessian is the RES-1 residual

claims.name: repulsive_quartic_u_eff_positive
claims.detail: (u_eff = U + 10 V M_R = 2.68502 > 0: dressed quartic repulsive)

claims.name: diagonal_hartree_convex
claims.detail: (Phi''(M) = (3/2) u_eff = 4.02754 > 0: the diagonal interaction is strictly convex in M, so the isotropic stationary point is the UNIQUE diagonal-class minimum, not merely an infimum)

claims.name: sextic_repulsive_coercive
claims.detail: (V = 3.24 > 0: the sextic (5v/2)M^3 -> +infty provides boundary coercivity (Math427 escape exclusion))

claims.name: entropy_hessian_positive_definite
claims.detail: (per-mode entropy Hessian 1/(2G^2) > 0 on the BZ grid: min 4.637e-02 > 0 -- -1/2 Tr ln G is convex in G)

claims.name: condensate_free_convex_implies_global_diagonal_min
claims.detail: (entropy convex + kinetic linear + Hartree convex (u_eff>0,V>0) => F[G] convex ABSENT the condensate off-diagonal coupling => isotropic dressing is the GLOBAL min over the full covariance class in that sector; the ONLY possible non-convexity is the condensate-induced off-diagonal (G1'') Hessian -- the named RES-1 residual)
